verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There’s a peace in my heart that the world never gave, A peace it cannot take away; Though the trials of life may surround like a cloud, I’ve a peace that has come here to stay!

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: All the world seemed to sing of a Savior and King, When peace sweetly came to my heart; Troubles all fled away a nd my night turned to day, Blessed Jesus, how glorious Thou art!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This treasure I have in a temple of clay, While here on His footstool I roam; But He’s coming to take me some glorious day, Over there to my heavenly home!
